sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Robotic Satellite Hover
special_mechanics.description: Player can crouch and hold A button while holding a robotic satellite companion to hover into the air

special_mechanics.name: Transformation
special_mechanics.description: Collecting the same letter combination twice in a row causes the player to combine with the robot for more powerful attacks. Lasts approximately 34 seconds in US version, 68 seconds in Japanese Solbrain version. Losing approximately 4.5 seconds per hit taken while transformed

tier_notes: Tier 2: Qualitative data only. No precise movement parameters, gravity values, jump physics, or sub-pixel system information documented in TCRF or Wikipedia sources. Game focuses on action/beat-em-up hybrid mechanics with robotic satellite power-ups rather than advanced platformer physics. Available sources provide game mechanics, level design, and regional differences but lack technical physics documentation.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Shatterhand article
